sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47251" key="h(miro/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμιρόδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47251.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥοδία</foreign> (q.v.), Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cultes Egyptiens</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0154.tlg001:236" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">236</biblScope> </bibl> (Delos, <date TEIform="date">ii B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
